metadata.name: App

passwordReset.subtitle: Enter your email address and we will send you a password reset link.
passwordReset.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.passwordRequired: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.sidePanelDescription: Intelligent and fast solution connecting talents with opportunities.

emailVerification.title: Verify your email
emailVerification.subtitle: We've sent a verification email to your email address.
emailVerification.sidePanelDescription: Intelligent and fast solution connecting talents with opportunities.

userView.title: User View
userView.description: This is your personal information page.
userView.inputPlaceholder: Tell me about your life, work experience, or interests
userView.initialMessage: Hi! 👋 Share a bit about yourself - I'll understand your personality traits and create your personal profile

chat.introduction: Hello! 👋 I'm your AI assistant for creating and managing your App profile. I can help you understand your psychological profile across 7 dimensions and find the perfect job matches. How can I help you today?
chat.suggestion1: I want to create my App profile. Let's get started!
chat.suggestion2: Tell me about the App profile dimensions
chat.suggestion3: How does the profile matching work?
chat.suggestion4: What can you help me with?

underDevelopment.title: App is being developed
underDevelopment.description: App is currently under development and will be available soon. Please check back later or contact us if you have any questions.

chat.noThreadsYet: No threads yet. Start a new chat to see them here.
chat.threadDeleteMessage: This action cannot be undone. The chat and all its messages will be permanently deleted.
chat.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Please double-check responses.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: We believe in transparent data practices
privacy.description: Learn how your information is protected when you use our platform, and visit our Privacy Policy for more details.
privacy.helpImproveDescription: Allow the use of your chats and sessions to train and improve AI models.

general.languageDescription: Choose the language for the interface.

renews.label: Renews on

account.title: Account
account.deleteAccountDescription: To delete your account, please cancel your subscription first.
account.confirmLogoutDescription: This will sign you out of all active sessions, including this one.
account.confirmDeleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. Your account and all associated data will be permanently deleted.
account.logoutAllError: Failed to sign out of all devices
account.signOutSessionError: Failed to sign out of this session

profile.title: Profile Information
profile.description: Update your personal information and profile settings
profile.preferencesLabel: What personal preferences should Claude consider in responses?
profile.preferencesDescription: Your preferences will apply to all conversations, within guidelines.
profile.preferencesPlaceholder: e.g. when learning new concepts, I find analogies particularly helpful
profile.deleteAccountTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
profile.deleteAccountDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove all your data from our servers.
profile.deleteAccountFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
